label: Transcribe audio
description: Transcribe an audio blob (from a row variable, e.g. data URL from a previous step) using Whisper in the QC sandbox. Saves the transcript to a row variable for use by the next step (e.g. whisperCheck).

formSchema.label: Row variable with audio (data/blob URL or https URL)
Save word timestamps JSON to variable (optional)
formSchema.hint: When Whisper returns word segments, JSON array of {text,start,end}.
